raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing a {$150.00} charge with Citibank ( Case ID XXXX ) related to a merchant failing to honor a written refund agreement. 

The merchant explicitly stated in writing that after I returned the item, they would issue a refund to either my gift card or my credit card. I selected my credit card ( ending in XXXX ) before returning the item and relied on that agreement. 

I returned the item using the merchants prepaid label. XXXX confirms delivery on XXXX XXXX, 2026. 

After receiving the return, the merchant refused to refund my credit card and instead issued a gift card. ' Citibank denied my dispute multiple times using incorrect reasoning, including : - Misclassifying the charge as return postage - Requesting a credit slip ( which does not exist because the merchant refused to issue the refund ) - Accepting a gift card as a valid resolution despite the prior written agreement The issue is not whether I received compensation, but whether the merchant honored the agreed refund method. 

I provided written documentation showing : - Merchant agreement to refund my credit card - My selection of refund to card ending in XXXX - Proof of return delivery - Merchant refusal to honor the agreement I am requesting that Citibank properly review the documentation and reverse the {$150.00} charge.
